title: Anniyur Agnipureeswarar Temple
tagline: Anniyur Agnipureeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Anniyur Agnipureeswarar Temple (அன்னியூர் அக்கினிபுரீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Vanniyur in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Anniyur Agnipureeswarar Temple (அன்னியூர் அக்கினிபுரீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Vanniyur in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva. He is called as Agnipureeswarar. His consort is known as Gowri Parvathi.

topPlaces.name: Cherugudi Sukshmapureeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Cherugudi Sukshmapureeswarar Temple (செருகுடி சூட்சுமபுரீசுவரர் கோயில் ])is a Hindu temple located at Cherugudi in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Serugudi Sukshmapureeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Serugudi Sukshmapureewarar Temple is a Hindu temple located in the village of Serugudi in the Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Uma Maheswarar Temple, Konerirajapuram
topPlaces.description: Uma Maheswarar Temple of Konerirajapuram in the Mayiladuthurai district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is a historical temple dedicated to Shiva. Shiva is worshiped as Uma Maheswarar, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as Mattuvar Kuzhalammai.

topPlaces.name: Sarguneswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Sarvaguneswarar Temple (சற்குணேஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple in the village of Karuveli in the Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is 500–1000 years old and dedicated to Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Thirupampuram
topPlaces.description: Thirupampuram is a village in the Kudavasal taluk of Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The famous Ragu, Kethu temple is located in Tirupampuram.

topPlaces.name: Tirucherai Gnanaparameswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: The Tirucherai Gnanaparameswarar Temple is a Tevara sthalam located in the village of Tirucherai near Kudavasal in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The place is located at a distance of 14 km south of Kumbakonam and 4 km north of Kudavasal.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Anniyur Agnipureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Anniyur Agnipureeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Anniyur Agnipureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (95 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (97 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Anniyur Agnipureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Anniyur Agnipureeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Anniyur Agnipureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Anniyur Agnipureeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Anniyur Agnipureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thiruveezhimizhalai, Vadamattam, Cherugudi Sukshmapureeswarar Temple, Serugudi Sukshmapureeswarar Temple, Uma Maheswarar Temple, Konerirajapuram.
